  "findings": [
    "Lockout/tagout device applied incorrectly: lock applied without an accompanying tag, or tag applied without an accompanying lock."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work immediately.",
    "Apply both a compliant lock and a highly visible warning tag to the energy isolating device.",
    "Verify zero energy state before resuming any service or maintenance work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.147, lockout and tagout devices must be used together to ensure full protection unless a lockout-only program is explicitly authorized and meets all strict criteria. Having a lock without a tag, or a tag without a lock, violates standard safety sequence and protocol, creating a high-risk condition for workers.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(4)"
  ]
}
